svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="BPMN - SP-02 Xac thuc OTP Guest" id="bpmn-sp02-otp"> <mxGraphModel dx="-899" dy="-307" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1850" pageHeight="1150" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="pool_guest" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=20;horizontal=0;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f5f5f5;" value="Guest" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="1750" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_start" parent="pool_guest" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.event;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=ellipsePerimeter;outlineConnect=0;aspect=fixed;outline=standard;symbol=general;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Bắt đầu" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="30" x="60" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_inputphone" parent="pool_guest" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=user;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Nhập số
điện thoại" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="150" y="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_gw1" parent="pool_guest" style="points=[[0.25,0.25,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[0.75,0.75,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.25,0.75,0],[0,0.5,0]];shape=mxgraph.bpmn.gateway2;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=rhombusPerimeter;outlineConnect=0;outline=none;symbol=none;gwType=exclusive;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Đã quá giới hạn
3 lần/ngày?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="50" x="370" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_blocked" parent="pool_guest" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=user;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Hiển thị thông báo
'Đã quá giới hạn hôm nay'" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="220" x="480" y="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_endblocked" parent="pool_guest" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.event;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=ellipsePerimeter;outlineConnect=0;aspect=fixed;outline=end;symbol=terminate2;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=3;" value="Return:
BLOCKED" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="36" x="750" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_otpscreen" parent="pool_guest" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=user;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Xem màn hình
nhập OTP" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="170" x="480" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_waitsms" parent="pool_guest" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.event;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=ellipsePerimeter;outlineConnect=0;aspect=fixed;outline=catching;symbol=message;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Chờ SMS" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="40" x="700" y="215" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_inputotp" parent="pool_guest" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=user;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Nhập 6 số OTP" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="170" x="790" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_gwexpire" parent="pool_guest" style="points=[[0.25,0.25,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[0.75,0.75,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.25,0.75,0],[0,0.5,0]];shape=mxgraph.bpmn.gateway2;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=rhombusPerimeter;outlineConnect=0;outline=none;symbol=none;gwType=exclusive;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Mã đã hết hạn
(> 10 phút)?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="50" x="1010" y="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_expired" parent="pool_guest" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=user;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Thông báo mã hết hạn,
yêu cầu gửi lại mã mới" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="220" x="1010" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_gw2" parent="pool_guest" style="points=[[0.25,0.25,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[0.75,0.75,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.25,0.75,0],[0,0.5,0]];shape=mxgraph.bpmn.gateway2;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=rhombusPerimeter;outlineConnect=0;outline=none;symbol=none;gwType=exclusive;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="OTP nhập
có đúng?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="50" x="1010" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_gw3" parent="pool_guest" style="points=[[0.25,0.25,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[0.75,0.75,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.25,0.75,0],[0,0.5,0]];shape=mxgraph.bpmn.gateway2;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=rhombusPerimeter;outlineConnect=0;outline=none;symbol=none;gwType=exclusive;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Còn lượt thử
(< 3 lần)?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="50" x="1010" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_retry" parent="pool_guest" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=user;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Hiển thị lỗi
'Sai mã',
cho nhập lại" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="170" x="1120" y="345" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_outoftries" parent="pool_guest" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=user;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Thông báo
'Hết lượt thử'" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="170" x="1120" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_endfail" parent="pool_guest" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.event;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=ellipsePerimeter;outlineConnect=0;aspect=fixed;outline=end;symbol=terminate2;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=3;" value="Return:
FAILED" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="36" x="1340" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_endsuccess" parent="pool_guest" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.event;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=ellipsePerimeter;outlineConnect=0;aspect=fixed;outline=end;symbol=terminate2;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=3;" value="Return: SUCCESS
+ session_token" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="40" x="1150" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pool_system" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=20;horizontal=0;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f5f5f5;" value="Hệ thống FitFuel+" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="400" width="1750" y="660" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_recvreq" parent="pool_system" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.event;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=ellipsePerimeter;outlineConnect=0;aspect=fixed;outline=standard;symbol=message;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Nhận yêu cầu
gửi OTP" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="30" x="60" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_checklimit" parent="pool_system" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=service;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Kiểm tra số
lần/ngày (BR-47)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="190" x="130" y="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_genotp" parent="pool_system" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=service;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Sinh OTP 6 số,

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 245, 245), rgb(26, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

'Đã quá giới hạn hôm nay'
